reviews.comment:
No me aceptaron Patagonia 365, la tarjeta de crédito de todos los empleados de Chubut!!! Ubiquese.... Estamos en Chubut, o pongan un cartel NO ACEPTAMOS TARJETAS DE LA PROVINCIA, SOLO NACIONALES.....

(Translated by Google)
They didn't accept my Patagonia 365 credit card, the credit card for all Chubut employees! Find your way... We're in Chubut, or put up a sign saying, "We don't accept provincial cards, only national ones."
